global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a travel booking service with a focus on convenience.

elements.label: Orange gradient background
elements.description: A smooth orange gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Book your next trip' prominently displayed at the center.

elements.label: Subheadline text
elements.description: Smaller white text below the headline that reads 'Hotels + flights in one tap'.

elements.label: Image placeholder
elements.description: An empty circular shape and a square shape, suggesting a placeholder for images.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button with the text 'Watch now' in white, located at the bottom center.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'CloudRoute' displayed at the top left in a bold font.
elements.text_content: Book your next trip Hotels flights in one tap

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small yellow badge with the word 'SALE' in bold black text at the top right.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A small text displaying the price '€9.99' in white, located at the bottom left.
